## What does this add or change?


## Checklist

- [ ] The page answers one clear question.
- [ ] I tested the workflow or clearly marked untested parts.
- [ ] I included inputs, tools, workflow, output, checks, and traps.
- [ ] I documented ethical/licensing issues where relevant.
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/check_answers.py`.
- [ ] I ran `mkdocs build --strict`.
